etfs.name: SPDR Gold Shares
etfs.desc: Largest gold ETF (~$70B AUM); tracks London gold price fix

etfs.name: iShares Gold Trust
etfs.desc: Physical gold ETF with 0.25% expense ratio; second largest by AUM

etfs.name: SPDR Gold MiniShares
etfs.desc: Lowest-cost large gold ETF at 0.10% expense ratio

etfs.name: Aberdeen Physical Gold ETF
etfs.desc: Physical gold stored in Swiss and UK vaults

etfs.name: VanEck Gold Miners ETF
etfs.desc: Tracks large gold mining companies, not physical gold

etfs.name: VanEck Junior Gold Miners
etfs.desc: Smaller mining stocks; higher risk/reward than major miners
